title: ranunculus crenifolius
intro: Ranunculus crenifolius, also known as the crenate buttercup, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits associated with Ranunculus crenifolius include relief from pain, inflammation, and anxiety, as well as potential antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health issues.
